title: Vodafone Said to Weigh Move to Transfer Part of India Unit Stake
title_cn: 沃达丰称正在考虑转让部分印度子公司股权
summary: Vodafone Group Plc is working on a proposal to shore up the capital of its listed Indian affiliate, as the venture seeks to turn over a new leaf after the Indian government cut a bill for outstanding spectrum fees, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Stocks Hit Record High on Jobs as Chipmakers Surge
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商的激增，就业人数创下历史新高
summary:
Signs of labor-market strength drove stocks to all-time highs, bolstering speculation that the world’s largest economy remains resilient in the face of an energy shock triggered by the Iran war.
Bets that solid growth will keep powering earnings sent the S&P 500 to its sixth straight weekly advance. A revival of the artificial-intelligence trade fueled an 11% jump in a gauge of chipmakers since last Friday. Oil notched a slide for the week. The US and Iran are working with mediators to formulate a memorandum of understanding that would set the parameters for a month of talks to end the war, the Wall Street Journal reported. Christel Rendu de Lint, co-CEO at Vontobel joins to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Hit Record High on Jobs as Chipmakers Surge: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商激增，股市创就业新高：市场结束
summary: Signs of labor-market strength drove stocks to all-time highs, bolstering speculation that the world’s largest economy remains resilient in the face of an energy shock triggered by the Iran war.

title: America’s Most Infamous Nuclear Site Returns to Fuel the AI Boom
title_cn: 美国最臭名昭著的核电站回归，推动人工智能繁荣
summary: The infamous Three Mile Island nuclear plant is poised for a comeback, driven by AI’s massive energy needs. Thanks to a long-term agreement signed by Microsoft Corp. and Constellation Energy Corp. in September 2024, the energy from the plant will power chatbots and other artificial intelligence applications. All this under a new and baggage-free name: the Crane Clean Energy Center. The agreement commits Microsoft to buying all the electricity produced by the site’s remaining functional 835-megawatt reactor for 20 years. Bloomberg News Energy Reporter Will Wade joins to discuss the return of the nuclear power plant on Three Mile Island. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Buyout Firms Tap Junk Debt for Payouts as Exits Stall
title_cn: 由于退出停滞，收购公司利用垃圾债进行支付
summary: Private equity firms are once again tapping the European junk debt market to pay themselves dividends as market volatility fueled by the Iran war and AI anxiety limits their ability to cash out.

title: Fed Calls Risks Tied to Private Credit Redemptions ‘Manageable’
title_cn: 美联储称与私人信贷赎回相关的风险“可控”
summary: The Federal Reserve said stability risks from further private credit redemption requests appear “limited and manageable,” after some of the biggest names in the market blocked investors from getting money out of their funds in recent months.

title: Applied Aerospace Files for IPO, Joining Pre-SpaceX Rush
title_cn: 应用航空航天公司申请首次公开募股 (IPO)，加入 Pre-SpaceX 热潮
summary: Applied Aerospace & Defense Inc. filed for a US initial public offering, joining a recent rush of space and defense firms to public markets ahead of the potential listing of SpaceX later this year.

title: Treasuries Gain to End Choppy Week as Focus Shifts to Inflation
title_cn: 随着焦点转向通胀，美国国债结束波动的一周
summary: Treasuries advanced at the close of the week as mixed economic data reinforced expectations the Federal Reserve will stay on hold, shifting the market’s focus back to inflation.

title: Boston Fed President on FOMC Dissent and Kevin Warsh’s Nomination
title_cn: 波士顿联储主席谈联邦公开市场委员会的异议和凯文·沃什的提名
summary: On the Big Take podcast, host David Gura and Bloomberg’s Maria Eloisa Capurro discuss her interview with Boston Fed President Susan Collins. They explore inflation, the economic fallout of the conflict in Iran and how the US central bank might evolve under Kevin Warsh’s leadership. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private School Charging $76,000 Offers Discount in Revival Plan
title_cn: 私立学校收费 76,000 美元提供复兴计划折扣
summary: A Colorado private school has tapped the debt markets for $27 million to fund campus upgrades while offering discounts on tuition as part of a turnaround plan.

title: Oil Ticks Higher as Gulf Clashes Threaten to Derail Ceasefire
title_cn: 海湾冲突威胁停火，油价走高
summary: Oil edged higher as traders speculated on whether fresh clashes between the US and Iran would derail a fragile ceasefire, dimming hopes a peace deal may be struck soon.

title: Blue Owl BDC Won Big New Investment by University of California
title_cn: Blue Owl BDC 获得加州大学新巨额投资
summary: A $200 billion investment fund for the University of California system added almost 30 million shares of Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp. in the first quarter, in a sign of institutions seizing upon volatility in the private credit market.

title: Private Credit Going Through 'Growing Pains': Aronov
title_cn: 阿罗诺夫：私人信贷正在经历“成长的烦恼”
summary: Oksana Aronov, head of market strategy for alternative fixed income at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Bloomberg's Caroline Hyde, Emily Graffeo, and Davide Scigliuzzo  on "Bloomberg Real Yield."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Doesn't Need to Cut Now: Rosner
title_cn: 罗斯纳：美联储现在不需要降息
summary: Lindsay Rosner, head of multi-sector fixed income investing at Goldman Sachs Asset Management, and Oksana Aronov, head of market strategy for alternative fixed income at JPMorgan Asset Management, join Caroline Hyde and Emily Graffeo on "Bloomberg Real Yield."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DraftKings Profit Beats, Ups Prediction Market Spending
title_cn: DraftKings 利润超出预期，预测市场支出
summary: DraftKings Inc. reported revenue that rose 17% to $1.65 billion, slightly ahead of analysts’ estimates for $1.63 billion and said it would spend more on a new push into predictions markets.

title: US Wage Gains Moderated, Jobless Rate Holds |  Real Yield 5/8/2026
title_cn: 美国工资增长放缓，失业率保持不变  实际收益率 5/8/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: JPMorgan Head of Market Strategy, Alternative Fixed-Income Oksana Aronov, Goldman Sachs Asset Management Lindsay Rosner, and Pimco Multi-Asset Credit Strategist Loti Karoui. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: KNDS IPO Wobbles Over Valuation as Peers Fall
title_cn: 随着同行下跌，KNDS IPO 估值波动
summary: KNDS NV’s plans for a summer initial public offering could be in doubt because of concerns about the tank maker’s valuation, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Apollo, Blackstone Weigh $35 Billion Financing for Broadcom
title_cn: Apollo 和 Blackstone 考虑为博通融资 350 亿美元
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. are among private credit lenders involved in talks with chipmaker Broadcom Inc. over a roughly $35 billion financing, the latest indication that companies are mobilizing all sources of capital to fund the AI build-out.

title: Milken Crowd Hates the Phrase ‘Semi-Liquid’ After Retail Exodus
title_cn: 零售业撤离后，米尔肯人群讨厌“半液体”这个词
summary: ‘Semi-liquid is kind of a diabolical name’

title: German Banks Look to Offload Troubled Loan on LA Office Tower
title_cn: 德国银行希望摆脱洛杉矶办公大楼的问题贷款
summary: German lenders are looking to sell a non-performing loan on the CalEdison Building in downtown Los Angeles, which has struggled to attract tenants.

title: Cuba Faces ‘Devastating’ Ripple Effects From US Hit to Mining
title_cn: 古巴面临美国打击采矿业带来的“毁灭性”连锁反应
summary: Canadian miner Sherritt International Corp.’s decision to shut down its nickel operations in Cuba under US duress will weigh heavily on an economy that’s already starved for hard currency and fuel.

title: Pentagon Begins Releasing Wave of Files on UFOs
title_cn: 五角大楼开始发布大量有关不明飞行物的文件
summary: The Pentagon has begun releasing a wave of government files on unidentified flying objects. Following a directive from President Trump, agencies are now identifying and declassifying decades of records. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Sachs Private Credit Fund’s Share of Bad Loans Rises
title_cn: 高盛私人信贷基金不良贷款比例上升
summary: A publicly-traded private credit fund managed by Goldman Sachs Group Inc. put two additional companies on non-accrual status in the first quarter, as the industry grapples with mounting concerns over exposure to businesses vulnerable to AI-driven disruption.

title: Ghana’s Credit Rating Upgraded by Fitch on Improved Finances
title_cn: 惠誉因财务状况改善而上调加纳信用评级
summary: Fitch Ratings upgraded Ghana’s sovereign credit rating on the government’s improved fiscal management and increased foreign reserves, even as the war in the Middle East threatens to derail the nation’s economic recovery.

title: Jobs Surge As AI Stocks Wobble | Open Interest 5/8/2026
title_cn: 随着人工智能股票的波动，就业机会激增未平仓合约 5/8/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Jobs jump, Hormuz tensions rise, and CoreWeave exposes the pressure behind the AI boom. Rick Rieder says stocks aren’t in a bubble, Joanne Hsu explains why consumers are still gloomy, Kevin Hassett rejects Treasury default talk, and top CEOs break down AI, giving, cyber, recycling, and the market rally. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Leadership Still in Tech: Hermann
title_cn: 市场领先地位仍在科技领域：赫尔曼
summary: Julia Hermann, Global Market Strategist at New York Life Investment Management, says market leadership is still firmly sitting with tech and Fed rate cuts are still on the table for 2026. She speaks to Bloomberg's Dani Burger on "Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela’s Faulty Power Grid Risks Derailing Economic Comeback
title_cn: 委内瑞拉电网故障可能导致经济复苏脱轨
summary: Venezuela announced emergency measures to stabilize its power grid after electricity consumption hit a nine-year high this week, reviving memories of blackouts and rationing that once crippled the economy.

title: Anthropic Inks $1.8 Billion Computing Deal With Akamai
title_cn: Anthropic 与 Akamai 签署价值 18 亿美元的计算交易
summary: Anthropic PBC has signed a $1.8 billion computing deal with cloud services provider Akamai Technologies Inc. to meet surging demand for its artificial intelligence software, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Musk, Altman Management Styles Under Fire at OpenAI Trial
title_cn: 马斯克、奥特曼的管理风格在 OpenAI 审判中受到批评
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman both took a beating over their leadership styles in court testimony this week as a jury waded further into their OpenAI feud.

title: QVC Shareholders Claim Firm Giving Away Their Value to Creditors
title_cn: QVC 股东声称公司将其价值拱手让给债权人
summary: Shareholders of bankrupt television shopping network QVC have accused the company of wrongly trying to give away hundreds of millions dollars worth of assets to other stakeholders as part of a proposal to cut debt and end the company’s insolvency case.

title: Google’s Isomorphic Labs to Raise Over $2 Billion in New Funding
title_cn: 谷歌同构实验室将筹集超过 20 亿美元的新资金
summary: Isomorphic Labs, an AI-powered drug discovery company spun out of Alphabet Inc.’s Google DeepMind, is in advanced discussions to raise more than $2 billion in a new round of funding, according to people familiar with the plan.

title: CoreWeave Shares Drop After Forecast Sparks Growth Fears | Bloomberg Tech 5/8/2026
title_cn: 预测引发增长担忧后 CoreWeave 股价下跌彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 8 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde sits down with CoreWeave CEO Michael Intrator to discuss the company's earnings as it builds out data center capacity. Plus, a deep dive into April's jobs report and the impact of AI on today's workforce with Clara Shih from the New Work Foundation. And, more earnings with Lyft CEO David Risher as the company spends on international expansion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Wants to Make H-1B Workers More Expensive for US Employers
title_cn: 特朗普希望让 H-1B 工人对美国雇主来说更加昂贵
summary: An entry‑level software engineer in San Francisco would need to be paid $162,000 a year to qualify for an H‑1B visa under a Trump administration proposal — almost 30% more than today. In Dallas, the minimum would jump by a similar rate to $113,000 and in New York to $132,000.

title: Why the 'SpaceMob' Is So Bullish on AST
title_cn: 为什么“SpaceMob”如此看好 AST
summary: AST SpaceMobile, a rival to SpaceX, has a huge online community that is helping drive the stock price higher. Bloomberg's Sana Pashankar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Impact of AI on Hiring, Workforce Trends
title_cn: 人工智能对招聘、劳动力趋势的影响
summary: Learning AI is becoming more and more crucial for workers to get hired, as 42% of recent grads are still underemployed. Clara Shih, founder and CEO of the New Work Foundation and former Head of Business at Meta, says she wants AI to be profitable not just for businesses, but for everyone - including the millions of 25-year-olds currently unemployed. She joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NYC School District Hit by Malware Attack as Well as Canvas Hack
title_cn: 纽约学区遭受恶意软件攻击和 Canvas 黑客攻击
summary: As the New York City Public School system grapples with the Canvas service hack affecting schools nationwide, one of its Manhattan campuses is contending with a separate incident.

title: Thiel-Backed Olympics Competitor Goes Public
title_cn: 蒂尔支持的奥运会竞争对手上市
summary: An Olympics-style sports event that welcomes performance-enhancing drugs is set for later this month in Las Vegas. The company behind that endeavor just went public in a merger with a blank-check company, a SPAC deal that valued it at $1.2 billion with backing from Peter Thiel and former Coinbase CTO Balaji Srinivasan. Enhanced CEO Maximilian Martin joins Caroline Hyde from the floor of the New York Stock Exchange on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel CEO Who Won Over Trump and Musk Now Needs a Breakthrough
title_cn: 赢得特朗普和马斯克支持的英特尔首席执行官现在需要突破
summary: After Lip-Bu Tan became chief executive officer of Intel Corp. in March of last year, the struggling company’s shares went nowhere for seven months while the chipmaker was getting trounced in the market for artificial intelligence.

title: gamma. CEO Larry Jackson on Music Career, Ye's Comeback
title_cn: 伽玛。首席执行官拉里·杰克逊谈音乐事业和叶的回归
summary: gamma. CEO & Co-Founder Larry Jackson discusses his career in the music industry, his relationship with Kanye West, and how artificial intelligence has changed the business. He talks with Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MercadoLibre Dives As Profits Miss on Rapid Growth Push
title_cn: MercadoLibre 因快速增长推动利润下滑而跳水
summary: Shares in e-commerce and fintech giant MercadoLibre Inc. slipped after profits missed estimates for the fourth quarter in a row even as revenue grew at its fastest pace in nearly four years.

title: Cloudflare Drops on Sales Forecast Miss, Job Cuts
title_cn: Cloudflare 因销售预测失误和裁员而下跌
summary: Cloudflare Inc. shares fell after the company said it would slash jobs and gave a forecast for revenue that fell short of analysts’ expectations.

title: Three Mile Island Gets an AI Makeover
title_cn: 三哩岛进行人工智能改造
summary: Due to a rising demand for electricity, Three Mile Island, the site of the most famous US nuclear accident, is coming back online, as soon as mid-2027, to power chatbots and other artificial intelligence applications. Bloomberg's Will Wade reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yahoo Pays Up to Refinance $1.6 Billion Debt Tied to Apollo Deal
title_cn: 雅虎支付与阿波罗交易相关的 16 亿美元债务再融资
summary: Yahoo Inc. raised $1.6 billion from a loan and bond deal to refinance debt tied to its acquisition by Apollo Global Management after offering investors one of the highest-yielding deals of the year.

title: Giant Virginia Data Center Project Upended by Clerical Error
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚巨型数据中心项目因文书错误而中断
summary: Developers bankrolled by two of the world’s biggest asset managers set their sights on building a massive data-center hub in Northern Virginia. A battle over newspaper advertising threw their plans into disarray.

title: Some College Finals Delayed After Canvas Online Platform Hacked
title_cn: Canvas 在线平台被黑后，一些大学期末考试被推迟
summary: A breach of a third-party online platform that is widely used by primary schools and colleges has disrupted classes and finals just as the academic year is coming to a close.

title: Saudi Delivery App Ninja Taps Banks for $1 Billion IPO
title_cn: 沙特配送应用 Ninja 寻求银行 10 亿美元 IPO
summary: Saudi startup Ninja has picked a roster of banks to work on a potential initial public offering in Riyadh, according to people familiar with the matter, pressing ahead with listing plans despite lingering uncertainty over the war in Iran.

title: OnlyFans Sells 16% Stake Weeks After Death of Owner Radvinsky
title_cn: 所有者拉德文斯基去世几周后，OnlyFans 出售 16% 的股份
summary: OnlyFans, the platform best known for adult content, agreed to sell a minority stake to Architect Capital in a deal that values the British company at about $3.15 billion.

title: CoreWeave's Q1 Earnings Were 'Transformational,' CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，CoreWeave 第一季度的盈利是“变革性的”
summary: CoreWeave CEO Michael Intrator characterizes the company's first-quarter earnings as transformational, highlighting strong performance across revenue and operating margins. Speaking on "Bloomberg Tech," Intrator emphasizes robust demand from existing AI-native and cloud customers, as well as new verticals such as trading and finance firms and robotics companies integrating AI at scale. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Near Record High as Chip Stocks Roar, Payrolls Beat
title_cn: 芯片股飙升、就业数据强劲，美国股市接近历史新高
summary: US stocks were on track for a record closing high, buoyed by semiconductor stocks, strong monthly payrolls figures and a US-Iran ceasefire that appeared intact even with overnight clashes near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Hackers Took Down Canvas Service Used by Thousands of Colleges Worldwide
title_cn: 黑客摧毁了全球数千所大学使用的 Canvas 服务
summary: Hackers briefly took down an online portal used by thousands of colleges around the world, disrupting services at institutions from Harvard and Princeton in the US to the University of Manchester in the UK and the Universidad del Desarrollo in Chile.

title: Akamai Shares Jump on $1.8 Billion AI Cloud Deal
title_cn: Akamai 股价因 18 亿美元 AI 云交易而上涨
summary: Akamai CEO Tom Leighton joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down a massive $1.8 billion AI cloud deal. Leighton said he could not give details on who the deal is with. He explains why it signals a shift away from big tech hyperscalers and how edge computing is becoming essential for stopping AI-powered cyberattacks, cutting costs, and delivering faster performance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Siemens Scores Win on EU Push to Streamline Industrial AI Rules
title_cn: 西门子在欧盟推动简化工业人工智能规则方面取得胜利
summary: Siemens AG and other European tech companies have made headway on reshaping regulation for artificial intelligence in the European Union they say is putting them behind rivals in the US and China.

title: Airbnb Boosts Annual Sales Outlook While Spending Picks Up
title_cn: Airbnb 在支出增加的同时提高了年度销售前景
summary: Airbnb Inc. boosted its annual forecast on robust bookings in the major markets in the Americas, while it posted a big jump in spending as part of an effort to diversify the business.

title: CoreWeave Shares Drop After Forecast Sparks Growth Fears
title_cn: 预测引发增长担忧后 CoreWeave 股价下跌
summary: CoreWeave Inc.’s shares dropped after the AI data center operator gave a disappointing forecast for the current quarter, sparking concerns about slowing growth at a time when the company is spending heavily to bolster its operations.

title: Summer Travel Is a Mess. The Points Guy Tells Us How to Hack It
title_cn: 夏季旅行一团糟。 Points Guy 告诉我们如何破解它
summary:
As summer travel ramps up, consumers are bracing for high gas prices, airport security mayhem, airlines going under and a raft of cancelled flights, while prices of hotels, car rentals and just about everything else seem to be steadily marching skyward.

The Points Guy founder Brian Kelly tells Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin to fear not. He joins a special Everybody's Business podcast recorded at an On Air Fest event to share a few tips for navigating this summer travel season. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: London Offers Snapshot of an Increasingly Ungovernable UK
title_cn: 伦敦提供了英国日益难以治理的概况
summary: The map of English councils lit up in a murky gray on Friday, as more and more town halls returned a divided composition that spells budget paralysis in future.

title: Trump Demands Deal From Tehran | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/8/2026
title_cn: 特朗普要求德黑兰达成协议|权力平衡：早期版本 5/8/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Kailey Leinz discusses the latest from the Middle East. On today's show, Messina Group CEO Jim Messina, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School's Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and The Washington Institute Senior Fellow Holly Dagres.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Expects Iranian Response Friday Amid Clashes in Hormuz
title_cn: 美国期待伊朗周五对霍尔木兹冲突做出回应
summary: The US said it expects Iran to respond to its latest proposal to end their war imminently, as clashes in the Strait of Hormuz threatened to further fracture a monthlong ceasefire.

title: US Prepares AI Security Order That Omits Mandatory Model Tests
title_cn: 美国准备省略强制性模型测试的人工智能安全令
summary: The Trump administration is preparing to order US agencies to partner with artificial intelligence companies to protect networks from AI-enabled cyber attacks, though the directive would stop short of requiring government approval for cutting-edge models, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Starmer Suffers Losses Across UK as Farage Redraws Political Map
title_cn: 法拉奇重新绘制政治版图，斯塔默在英国各地蒙受损失
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer rejected calls to step aside as Labour leader, after a historic round of elections that saw Nigel Farage prove his populist Reform UK can win across Britain and pro-independence parties advance in Scotland and Wales.

title: Trump Plans to Fire FDA’s Makary After Tumult at Agency
title_cn: 在 FDA 发生骚乱后，特朗普计划解雇 FDA 的 Makary
summary: President Donald Trump plans to fire Food and Drug Administration Commissioner Marty Makary, following months of chaos at one of the country’s most important health agencies, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Inflation Is 'Topic of the Moment,' Says Fed's Goolsbee
title_cn: 美联储古尔斯比表示，通胀是“当前的话题”
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago President Austan Goolsbee said it was a "pretty stable" month for job growth. He says inflation is the "topic of the moment" though for policymakers. He speaks to Bloomberg's Michael McKee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Powell’s Fed Legacy
title_cn: 鲍威尔的美联储遗产
summary: Bloomberg News examines the major moves and turning points of Jerome Powell’s tenure as Federal Reserve Chair. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Appeals Latest Legal Setback to His Tariff Regime Rollout
title_cn: 特朗普对其关税制度推出的最新法律挫折提出上诉
summary: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed.

title: Fed's Goolsbee on Inflation Risk, Rates and Warsh
title_cn: 美联储古尔斯比谈通胀风险、利率和沃什
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago President Austan Goolsbee says he is less optimistic about disinflation progress and adds that there needs to be more clarity on where inflation is headed. He speaks with Mike McKee on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Releases UFO Files for Americans to Decide What’s Real
title_cn: 五角大楼发布不明飞行物文件供美国人决定什么是真实的
summary: The Pentagon made good on President Donald Trump’s promise to start releasing hundreds more declassified files linked to decades of UFO sightings, saying Americans can study the “new, never-before-seen” material and decide for themselves if aliens are real.

title: Virginia 'Has to' Bring Redistricting Case To the Supreme Court Says Jim Messina
title_cn: 吉姆·梅西纳表示，弗吉尼亚州“必须”向最高法院提起选区重新划分案件
summary: Jim Messina, Former Campaign Manager for President Obama's 2012 reelection campaign and previous White House deputy chief of staff,  joins Balance of Power joins to discuss the redistricting fight happening across the US. As well as how Trump is pressing for a deal with Iran because the White House realizes that high gasoline prices going into the summer will be politically damaging for Republicans in the midterms.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Announces Three-Day Ceasefire Between Russia, Ukraine
title_cn: 特朗普宣布俄罗斯和乌克兰停火三天
summary: President Donald Trump announced a three-day ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine over the weekend, after Moscow pushed Kyiv for a temporary truce to allow Vladimir Putin to host a parade in his capital.

title: Trump Said to Sign Off on Firing FDA's Makary
title_cn: 特朗普表示将签署解雇 FDA 的马卡里的决定
summary: President Donald Trump plans to fire FDA Commissioner Marty Makary, following months of chaos at one of the country’s most important health agencies, according to a person familiar with the matter. Jeff Mason has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Bad for Labour? Britain’s Local Elections in Six Charts
title_cn: 对劳动力有多不利？英国地方选举六张图表
summary: Anyone hoping for a decisive result in UK elections to settle questions about the future of Prime Minister Keir Starmer were likely disappointed. Returns presented a mixed picture.

title: Democrats’ Midterm Math Takes Hit as Court Axes Virginia Map
title_cn: 法院取消弗吉尼亚州地图，民主党中期数学受到打击
summary: Democrats were dealt a blow in their efforts to minimize Republican redistricting gains around the US when the Virginia Supreme Court on Friday blocked a voter-approved map that would have flipped as many as four GOP-held US House seats in November’s midterm elections.

title: Canada Aims to Approve Projects in a Year After Criticism It’s Too Slow
title_cn: 加拿大计划在批评后一年内批准项目，但速度太慢
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government is pushing to speed up the timeline for federal reviews of major projects to one year, after facing repeated criticism that Canada’s regulatory processes are too slow.

title: ABC Fires Back at FCC For ‘Chilling Effect’ on Free Speech
title_cn: ABC 回击 FCC 对言论自由的“寒蝉效应”
summary: Walt Disney Co.’s ABC network fired back at the Federal Communications Commission on Friday, accusing the regulatory agency of seeking to “chill critical protected speech” and denouncing the government’s efforts to shape media content to its liking.

title: Virginia's Top Court Blocks New Congressional Map
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州最高法院阻止新的国会地图
summary: The Virginia Supreme Court blocked a new congressional map approved by state voters that was poised to help Democrats gain additional US House seats, giving Republicans an important victory after a year of redistricting efforts had largely ended in a stalemate. Greg Giroux of Bloomberg Government breaks down the case and what happens next on Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthony Scaramucci: Wall Street Has Trump Regrets
title_cn: 安东尼·斯卡拉穆奇：华尔街对特朗普感到遗憾
summary: Anthony Scaramucci tells Mishal Husain that Wall Street is having regrets about support for Donald Trump. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Scotland’s Pro-Independence SNP Set to Win Fifth Straight Term
title_cn: 苏格兰支持独立的苏格兰民族党将连续第五个任期获胜
summary: The Scottish National Party declared victory in its bid to secure a record fifth term in government, though results so far suggest leader John Swinney will fall short of the majority he’s said would give him a mandate for a new referendum on Scotland leaving the UK.

title: UK Bonds Rally as Starmer Says He’ll Stay as Prime Minister
title_cn: 斯塔默表示将继续担任首相，英国债券上涨
summary: UK government bonds posted a relief rally after Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to stay in his job despite deep local election losses, with investors set to focus on any fallout on his leadership in coming weeks.

title: Ramaphosa’s Future in Doubt as Impeachment Risk Resurfaces
title_cn: 弹劾风险再次浮现，拉马福萨的未来存疑
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa’s future hangs in the balance after the country’s top court revived an inquiry into a burglary at his farm that he was accused of covering up.

title: Bruising Election for Starmer Sees Farage’s Reform Surge
title_cn: 斯塔默的惨败选举见证了法拉奇的改革浪潮
summary:
Support for Nigel Farage's right-wing Reform party surged in a series of local elections that dealt a further blow to UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

Alex Morgan explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Does the UK Really Want to Change PMs Now?
title_cn: 英国现在真的想更换首相吗？
summary: With all this global uncertainty, how can Keir Starmer maintain Labour’s position? Bloomberg Opinion columnist Rosa Prince explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Labour Facing Defeat in Wales as Reform and Plaid Cymru Surge
title_cn: 随着改革和格子西姆鲁的兴起，威尔士工党面临失败
summary: Labour faces a heavy defeat in the elections for the Welsh assembly, in what would be a historic loss for Keir Starmer’s governing party in a part of the country there they’ve come out on top for more than a century.
